{{Quote|Safely deliver the Jedi Council's message to our allies on Albecus, but return quickly. We have foreseen much trouble on the horizon.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="FoS">''[[Full of Surprises]]''</ref>}}
'''Albecus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]] friendly to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was situated close to the world [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. The planet saw the establishment of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] safe-house after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The criminal [[Kikow]] tried and failed to set up an underworld empire on Albecus during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Planet-stub}}
